description_long: A round ceramic plate holds two classic hamburgers and a serving of French fries. The hamburgers feature golden-brown sesame seed buns, with visible layers of lettuce, tomato, cheese, and beef patty peeking out from the sides. The fries are served in a branded paper sleeve, slightly spilling onto the plate. The buns are lightly dusted with sesame seeds, and the cheese appears to be melted over the patties. The plate itself is a muted gray with a slightly rustic finish, and the fries are a pale yellow with a crisp texture. The overall presentation is typical of a fast-food meal, with a focus on convenience and visual appeal.
description: Two sesame seed hamburgers and a portion of fries are served on a gray ceramic plate, with visible toppings and a branded fry sleeve.
description_view_0: Front view shows both hamburgers and the fries in their sleeve, with toppings and sesame seeds clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the fries in the branded sleeve and the side profile of the hamburgers, with toppings peeking out.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the backs of the hamburgers and the fry sleeve, with less visibility of the toppings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the fries spilling out of the sleeve and the tops of the hamburger buns.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce, tomato, and cheese are layered between the sesame seed buns, with toppings distributed evenly and some visible at the edges.
